data.body: AC amendment: Specify the adapter resolution algorithm explicitly: the 'adapter' field in recipe-registry.yaml stores the adapter script filename (e.g., 'rope-adapter.sh'). The executor resolves: '{ADAPTERS_DIR}/{adapter_field_value}' where ADAPTERS_DIR defaults to 'plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/' (or TEST_ADAPTERS_DIR if set). Verify this is consistent with c87c-7893 registry schema where adapter field stores exact filename.
